utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (so number_total = 6). The final property solution includes all six items, each fully detailed. 'property' includes property details (id, price, currency, bedrooms, location, size). 'financing' includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, and term. 'legal_services' includes service name, cost, and currency. 'moving_services' includes service level, cost, currency, and packing/unpacking details. 'setup_services' includes utility package type, cost, currency, services included, and survey costs. 'total_budget' includes a full breakdown with property_price, down_payment, mortgage_amount, all service costs, total_initial_cash_outlay, grand_total_estimated_package_cost, and currency. All six items are present and fully specified.
